name: move_to_midpoint_with_bot1
description: Move to the midpoint between Bot2 and Bot1 to regroup safely at x:1.0, z:1.0 when no hostiles are present
parameters: z.object({ x: z.number().describe("The targeted midpoint x coordinate"), z: z.number().describe("The targeted midpoint z coordinate"), radius: z.number().default(1).describe("The distance from the target coordinates to stop") })

name: melee_attack_nearest_hostile
description: Attack the nearest hostile mob with stone sword when in close range
parameters: z.object({ target_id: z.number().optional().describe("The specific entity ID of the hostile mob to attack. If not provided, the bot will seek the nearest hostile."), weapon: z.string().describe("The weapon to equip and use for the attack, e.g., 'stone_sword'.") })
